workflow.name: KDBP Story Creation
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ECC-ORCHESTRATED STORY CREATION — Adaptive pipeline based on story complexity
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip all generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at Step 2 (no epics). All other steps auto-proceed.
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors. Step 7 adds [WI] intent block. Step 9 records ledger.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-story-discovery.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-classification.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-planner.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-architect.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-parallel-review.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-story-generation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-completion.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-09-story-ledger.md
